creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text: There could be another alternate version that uses python to query pyproject.toml for the name (as shown in comment 2).  Then wheel name could be decoupled from the PORTNAME.  If one could come up with a patch that did that query without the extra penalty of forking another python command, I think that would be best.  But I don't yet have a patch that does that.  A patch which did that name query would also be a change to python.mk
